title: GoW Data Pack - Craftable Weapons with Special Abilities
description: Craftable Weapons with Special Abilities from the game God Of War
body:
![A multiplayer-friendly datapack, inspired by the famous video game, **God of War**.](https://i.imgur.com/rZr7VLA.png)

## About

This datapack aims to bring most of the iconic weapons from the God of War universe to Minecraft with their special abilities. We are planning to update this pack with boss fights and achievements later on!

### You can:
- Showcase the datapack and/or resource pack in any format if you credit the authors (**Techno573** & **Szombie**).
- Share the datapack and/or resource pack with the **CurseForge**, **Modrinth** or **PlanetMinecraft** links.
- Use the datapack and/or resource pack on your own server.
- Modify the datapack and/or the resource pack for **private** use only!

### You can't:
- Claim the datapack and/or the resource pack **as your own**.
- Modify the datapack or the resource pack for **public** use.
- Reupload any contents of the datapack and/or resource pack to **anywhere**.
- Showcase or share the data pack and/or resource pack without **properly crediting the authors**.

<sub> **WARNING**: If you disregard ANY of the above statements, measures will be taken to prevent any kind of theft! We will make sure to have all of our reuploaded and/or stolen packs removed. Thank you for understanding! </sub>

### For more info about the data pack and its features, check our [wiki](https://github.com/Techno573/techno_szombie_gow_datapack/wiki)

## Credits

The data pack with the special abilities, crafting recipes and all other scripts were made by **Techno573**.
The models, textures and sound effects were made and/or edited by **Szombie**.
